headline: FTI to Supply Subsea Infrastructure for Angola's Greater PAJ Project
summary: TechnipFMC lands a $75M-$250M Angola subsea contract for Greater PAJ, boosting second-quarter 2026 inbound orders with deepwater flowlines and risers.

headline: Kanin Energy Develops 7 MW Waste Heat to Power Project at Colorado Gas Plant
summary: Kanin Energy today announced plans to develop a 7-megawatt waste heat to power (WHP) facility at the Phillips 66 Mewbourn natural gas processing complex in Platteville, Colorado. The project represents an innovative collaboration that leverages industrial waste heat to generate onsite, baseload power, supporting plant reliability and long-term operational resilience while reducing the facility's environmental footprint.
